import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut idx = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut tok = ""
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    let b = match b_opt
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      if string.len(tok) > 0
        if idx % 2 == 0
          if first
            out = "#{tok}"
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{tok}"
          end
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(tok) > 0
    if idx % 2 == 0
      if first
        out = "#{tok}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{tok}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
